race.comment: POINT VEGA (1) went forward and proved too strong when resuming last time out, scoring by 2.25 lengths over 1000m at this track. Taking on a better field but he is worth serious consideration.  LA BELLA BOOM (5) tackled city class latest when eighth at Doomben, finishing 4 lengths from the winner. Backmarker who keeps coming and her best form puts her right in this. SPIRIT OF BARTY (10) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on. Include in all multiples. SEVEER (9) returns from a spell. Recent trial winner at Toowoomba Inner Track. Opened last campaign with an 11th at this track over 1000m. Expecting an effective return.
